features.name: 2D parameter array with dynamic dimensions
features.description: Code should include a 2D parameter array declaration where dimensions are computed from other parameters

features.name: 2D parameter array indexing with genvar in generate loop
features.description: Code should include a 2D parameter array indexed by genvar variables from a nested generate loop used in parameter override

features.name: 2D parameter array passed to submodule
features.description: Code should include a 2D parameter array passed as a parameter to a submodule instantiation

features.name: genvar-indexed 2D parameter array access in submodule parameter
features.description: Code should include a submodule that takes a 2D parameter array and uses parameter indices to access its elements as a default parameter value
